pageDescription: Calculate the magic number for playoff contention in sports

placeholders.totalGames: Enter total games in season (default: 162 for MLB)

definition.title: Magic Number Definition
definition.description: The number of additional wins by the leading team or losses by the chasing team needed to clinch a playoff spot

formula.title: Calculation Formula
formula.description: Magic Number = (Total Games + 1) - (Leader's Wins + Chaser's Losses)

interpretation.title: Scenario Interpretation
interpretation.description: When magic number reaches zero, the team has mathematically clinched the playoff spot

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides magic number calculations only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual playoff scenarios may be affected by tiebreaker rules and head-to-head results

importantNotesList: Magic number decreases with each win by the leader or loss by the chaser
A magic number of 1 means the team can clinch with one more win or favorable result
Tiebreaker scenarios may require additional considerations
Magic number is commonly used in baseball, basketball, and hockey

messages.enterInformation: Enter team records and season information to calculate magic number
messages.resultMessage: Your magic number calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides magic number calculations based on standard sports mathematics formulas. Actual playoff scenarios may be affected by tiebreaker rules, head-to-head results, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Sports Resources
seekHelp.content: For comprehensive sports standings analysis and playoff scenarios, consult official league websites, sports news sources, or professional sports analysts.

errors.teamWins: Please enter a valid number of team wins
errors.teamLosses: Please enter a valid number of team losses
errors.teamGamesPlayed: Please enter a valid number of team games played
errors.leaderWins: Please enter a valid number of leader wins
errors.leaderLosses: Please enter a valid number of leader losses
errors.leaderGamesPlayed: Please enter a valid number of leader games played
errors.totalGames: Please enter a valid total number of games in season

tooltips.teamWins: Number of wins for the team chasing the playoff spot
tooltips.teamLosses: Number of losses for the team chasing the playoff spot
tooltips.teamGamesPlayed: Total number of games played by the chasing team
tooltips.leaderWins: Number of wins for the team leading the division or wild card
tooltips.leaderLosses: Number of losses for the team leading the division or wild card
tooltips.leaderGamesPlayed: Total number of games played by the leading team
tooltips.totalGames: Total number of games in the season (e.g., 162 for MLB, 82 for NHL)

enter_your_teams_wins_rivals_losses_and_: Enter your team's wins, rival's losses, and total games in the season
total_games_in_the_season_162_for_mlb_5: Total games in the season (162 for MLB)
current_losses_by_your_closest_rival_9: Current losses by your closest rival
lower_magic_number_means_closer_to_clinc: Lower magic number means closer to clinching
the_magic_number_shows_how_many_combined:
The Magic Number shows how many combined wins by your team or losses by the closest rival are
                        needed to clinch a division title or playoff spot. It's a simple but powerful statistic that
                        helps fans and teams track how close they are to securing qualification.
every_win_by_your_team_reduces_the_magic: Every win by your team reduces the Magic Number by 1
every_loss_by_your_rival_reduces_the_mag: Every loss by your rival reduces the Magic Number by 1
magic_number_1_means_one_final_push_need: Magic Number = 1 means one final push needed
any_combination_of_5_more_wins_by_your_t:
Any combination of 5 more wins by your team OR 5 more losses by your rival will clinch the
                          division.
